title: heterostemma alatum
intro: Heterostemma alatum, also known as the winged heterostemma, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of India and Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The plant has been traditionally used to promote overall health and wellness, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving immune function. Heterostemma alatum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or topically to harness its medicinal properties.
